name: D.J. Rausa, Attorney At Law
description_short: San Diego-based bankruptcy attorney David J. Rausa specializes in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, offering free consultations and credit card payment options.
description_long:
D.J. Rausa, Attorney at Law is a bankruptcy law practice located in San Diego, California, founded and operated by David J. Rausa. The firm maintains a physical office at 1081 Camino Del Rio South, Suite 207, and can be reached at (619) 295-3322. The practice focuses exclusively on personal bankruptcy representation for San Diego-area residents.

The firm offers legal representation for both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings. Chapter 7 bankruptcy involves liquidation of assets and discharge of qualifying debts, while Chapter 13 involves a court-supervised repayment plan over 3-5 years. David J. Rausa provides consultation services to evaluate which filing type is appropriate for individual circumstances. The firm advertises free initial consultations to prospective clients and accepts credit card payments, reducing barriers to accessing legal services.

The firm's primary distinction is its specialization—it does not appear to offer general practice legal services, focusing narrowly on bankruptcy law. This specialization may indicate deeper expertise in federal bankruptcy code, local court procedures, and negotiation with creditors and trustees. The firm's presence on FindLaw's legal directory and the availability of free consultations suggests a client-accessible approach.

As of the website's last update (02/01/2026), the firm has no published client reviews on FindLaw, which limits third-party verification of service quality or client outcomes. The website provides only basic contact information and practice areas without detailed information about attorney credentials, years in practice, case success rates, fee structures, or client testimonials. Prospective clients would need to contact the firm directly to obtain pricing, experience details, and case-specific assessments.

diagnosis: D.J. Rausa is best for San Diego residents seeking specialized bankruptcy representation, particularly those exploring whether Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 is appropriate for their situation. The main caveat is the complete lack of online information about the attorney's experience, credentials, or track record—prospective clients must contact directly and conduct independent verification through State Bar disciplinary databases before engaging services.
